title: stylisma angustifolia
intro: Stylisma angustifolia is a perennial herb native to the southeastern United States, belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Stylisma angustifolia include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or added to salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
